001package guiInviteUsers;
002
003import javafx.geometry.Pos;
004import javafx.scene.control.Button;
005import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox;
006import javafx.scene.control.Label;
007import javafx.scene.control.TextField;
008import javafx.scene.layout.Pane;
009import javafx.scene.text.Font;
010import javafx.stage.Stage;
011import javafx.scene.Scene;
012
013/*******
014 * <p> Title: ViewInviteUsers Class</p>
015 * 
016 * <p> Description: The View for the Invite Users page. This class provides the GUI
017 * for admins to generate invitation codes for new users.</p>
018 * 
019 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
020 * 
021 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
022 * 
023 * @version 1.00                2026-02-09 Initial version
024 *  
025 */
026
027public class ViewInviteUsers {
028        
029        private static double width = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_WIDTH;
030        private static double height = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_HEIGHT;
031        
032        // GUI widgets
033        private static Label label_PageTitle = new Label("Invite New User");
034        private static Label label_Instructions = new Label(
035                        "Enter the email address of the user and select their role, then click Generate Code");
036        
037        private static Label label_EmailAddress = new Label("Email Address:");
038        protected static TextField text_EmailAddress = new TextField();
039        
040        private static Label label_Role = new Label("Select Role:");
041        protected static ComboBox<String> comboBox_Role = new ComboBox<>();
042        
043        private static Button button_GenerateCode = new Button("Generate Invitation Code");
044        private static Button button_Return = new Button("Return to Admin Home");
045        
046        // Scene and stage
047        private static ViewInviteUsers theView;
048        protected static Stage theStage;
049        protected static entityClasses.User theUser;
050        private static Pane theRootPane;
051        private static Scene theInviteScene = null;
052        
053        /**
054         * Display the Invite Users page
055         * @param ps the JavaFX Stage
056         * @param user the current user
057         */
058        public static void displayInviteUsers(Stage ps, entityClasses.User user) {
059                theStage = ps;
060                theUser = user;
061                
062                // Only create once if not already instantiated
063                if (theView == null) {
064                        theView = new ViewInviteUsers();
065                }
066                
067                // Set the title and display the scene
068                theStage.setTitle("CSE 360 Foundation Code: Invite New User");
069                theStage.setScene(theInviteScene);
070                theStage.show();
071        }
072        
073        /**
074         * Private constructor to initialize the view
075         */
076        private ViewInviteUsers() {
077                // Create the root pane and scene
078                theRootPane = new Pane();
079                theInviteScene = new Scene(theRootPane, width, height);
080                
081                // Set up the page title
082                setupLabelUI(label_PageTitle, "Arial", 32, width, Pos.CENTER, 0, 20);
083                
084                // Set up instructions
085                setupLabelUI(label_Instructions, "Arial", 14, width, Pos.CENTER, 0, 70);
086                
087                // Set up email address label and field
088                setupLabelUI(label_EmailAddress, "Arial", 16, 150, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 50, 130);
089                setupTextUI(text_EmailAddress, "Arial", 16, 300, Pos.BASELINE_LEFT, 250, 130, true);
090                text_EmailAddress.setPromptText("user@example.com");
091                text_EmailAddress.textProperty().addListener((_, _, _) -> {
092                        ControllerInviteUsers.setEmailAddress();
093                });
094                
095                // Set up role label and combobox
096                setupLabelUI(label_Role, "Arial", 16, 150, Pos.BASELINE_RIGHT, 50, 180);
097                comboBox_Role.setStyle("-fx-font-size: 16");
098                comboBox_Role.getItems().addAll("student", "staff", "admin");
099                comboBox_Role.setValue("student");
100                comboBox_Role.setPrefWidth(300);
101                comboBox_Role.setLayoutX(250);
102                comboBox_Role.setLayoutY(165);
103                comboBox_Role.setOnAction((_) -> {
104                        ControllerInviteUsers.setSelectedRole();
105                });
106                
107                // Set up generate code button
108                setupButtonUI(button_GenerateCode, "Dialog", 16, 220, Pos.CENTER, 300, 250);
109                button_GenerateCode.setOnAction((_) -> {
110                        ControllerInviteUsers.generateInvitationCode();
111                });
112                
113                // Set up return button
114                setupButtonUI(button_Return, "Dialog", 16, 220, Pos.CENTER, 300, 450);
115                button_Return.setOnAction((_) -> {
116                        ControllerInviteUsers.returnToAdminHome(theStage);
117                });
118                
119                // Add all widgets to the pane
120                theRootPane.getChildren().addAll(
121                                label_PageTitle,
122                                label_Instructions,
123                                label_EmailAddress,
124                                text_EmailAddress,
125                                label_Role,
126                                comboBox_Role,
127                                button_GenerateCode,
128                                button_Return
129                );
130        }
131        
132        // Helper methods for UI setup
133        
134        /**
135         * Set up label UI properties
136         */
137        private void setupLabelUI(Label l, String ff, double f, double w, Pos p, double x, double y) {
138                l.setFont(Font.font(ff, f));
139                l.setMinWidth(w);
140                l.setAlignment(p);
141                l.setLayoutX(x);
142                l.setLayoutY(y);
143        }
144        
145        /**
146         * Set up button UI properties
147         */
148        private void setupButtonUI(Button b, String ff, double f, double w, Pos p, double x, double y) {
149                b.setFont(Font.font(ff, f));
150                b.setMinWidth(w);
151                b.setAlignment(p);
152                b.setLayoutX(x);
153                b.setLayoutY(y);
154        }
155        
156        /**
157         * Set up text field UI properties
158         */
159        private void setupTextUI(TextField t, String ff, double f, double w, Pos p, double x, double y, boolean e) {
160                t.setFont(Font.font(ff, f));
161                t.setMinWidth(w);
162                t.setMaxWidth(w);
163                t.setAlignment(p);
164                t.setLayoutX(x);
165                t.setLayoutY(y);
166                t.setEditable(e);
167        }
168}
